description: You are a wholesale sales representative who sends regular follow-up emails after product demos. Create a reusable email template in Thunderbird with the subject "Follow-Up: Product Demo and Next Steps". The body must contain the following text in order: "Thank you for taking the time to attend our product demonstration.", "Please find our latest product catalog and pricing at your convenience.", "I would be happy to schedule a follow-up call to discuss volume pricing and delivery timelines.", and a closing block consisting of "Best regards", "Alex Torres, Regional Sales Manager", and "555-867-5309". Save the message as a template in the Local Folders Templates folder. Do not send the email.

metadata.expected_subject: Follow-Up: Product Demo and Next Steps
